fields.description:
## Description
Document the code-health surface for client adoption. No novel architecture (T1) — this is documentation of the shipped surface.

## Grounded facts (E4 — verified via Grep/Read; drives what gets documented)
- VERIFIED `grep -n "^\\[project.optional-dependencies\\]" pyproject.toml` + the block: today the extras are mcp/reviewbot/ui/agents/eval/tracing/grounding/grounding-t2/dev — there is NO `metrics` extra yet; it is ADDED by ticket 9597 (depends chain) and contains ONLY `lizard`.
- scc and jscpd are EXTERNAL PATH CLIs, NOT pip deps and NOT in the extra (consistent with the grounding extras own comment: "scc/lizard ... are external CLIs, not pip deps").
- VERIFIED `test -f tests/scripts/test_metrics_docs.py` — it already exists (ticket 121b) with a narrower contract; this ticket EXTENDS it without breaking existing assertions.
- `docs/config.md` is the canonical config reference (`head -1 docs/config.md` = "# rebar configuration — design of record (ADR) + reference").

## Approach (G6)
Document the three-part adoption (`pip install rebar[metrics]` for lizard + `scc` on PATH + `jscpd` on PATH) in the existing docs, and extend the existing docs test rather than adding a parallel one. Rationale: single source of truth, and the pinned docs-test is the enforcement point.

## Acceptance criteria (observable + proving command)
- [ ] reuse-surface documents the analyzer seam + `[metrics]` extra (lizard) + scc/jscpd as separate PATH prereqs. PROVE: `grep -Eq "metrics\\]" docs/reuse-surface.md && grep -q "scc" docs/reuse-surface.md`.
- [ ] `docs/config.md` documents every `[code_health]` key with type + default. PROVE: `grep -q "\\[code_health\\]" docs/config.md`.
- [ ] user-guide documents the three-part install + "no analyzer -> Unavailable" behavior. PROVE: `grep -q "rebar\\[metrics\\]" docs/user-guide.md`.
- [ ] The existing + new assertions pass. PROVE: `pytest -q tests/scripts/test_metrics_docs.py` (green: pre-existing 121b assertions AND the new metrics-surface assertions).

## Dependencies: 0734 (content prerequisite; relates_to recorded).
## Files: docs/reuse-surface.md, docs/config.md, docs/user-guide.md, AGENTS.md, tests/scripts/test_metrics_docs.py (extend)
## Scope: M

## Plan corrections (round 4 — supersede any conflicting text above)
- AC4 ENUMERATED ASSERTIONS (G6/T8): extend `tests/scripts/test_metrics_docs.py` with these SPECIFIC new assertions (the pre-existing 121b assertions must still pass): (1) `docs/reuse-surface.md` contains "[metrics]" AND "scc" AND "jscpd"; (2) `docs/config.md` contains "[code_health]"; (3) `docs/user-guide.md` contains "rebar[metrics]" AND an Unavailable-fallback phrase (e.g. "no analyzer"). PROVE: `pytest -q tests/scripts/test_metrics_docs.py::test_metrics_surface_documented` (the new assertions) AND the file's pre-existing tests still pass.
